---
title: 'Mountain Adventure: A Day in the High Country'
author: 'Mark'
date: '2025-05-26'
categories: ['Adventure']
image: 'images/mountain-vista.webp'
format: html
description: "I just happen to like this photo, so I am posting it."
---

# A Day in the Mountains

**Date:** May 26, 2025  
**Location:** Blue Ridge Mountains  
**Activity:** Hiking
---

![Mountain Vista](images/mountain-vista.webp)

What a great photo. 

---



Stay tuned for more adventures on [TourWithMark.com](https://TourWithMark.com)!
